message:
feat(e2e): add OpLog spec with JSONL format and 3 presets (bd-1an0)

Implement deterministic OpLog format for reproducible E2E differential
testing: OpLogHeader (fixture, seed, RNG, concurrency model), OpRecord
(op_id, worker, OpKind, expected result), JSONL roundtrip. Three presets:
commutative_inserts_disjoint_keys, hot_page_contention, mixed_read_write.
7 new tests passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
